title: Totem Player Model
description: If you rename the totem to player nick and add a _Model example:(Fostik_Model)
body:
**If you rename the totem to the player's nickname and add a _model, for example:(Fostik_Model), then you will get a totem in the form of a player model, also, if _ is at the end of the nickname, then _ is not necessary to write. NOT ALL NICKNAMES ARE LISTED IN THE RESOURCE PACKAGE, BUT ONLY THOSE NICKNAMES THAT THE CREATOR ADDED, THAT IS, YOUTUBERS, THE CREATORS OF MINECRAFT OR THOSE WHO ORDERED THE MODELS. You can order the creator to make a model for you (order more than one model) to write to discord @fostik__ .**

**Totems**

- Axolotls
  - Axolotl
  - Blue Axolotl
  - Brown Axolotl
  - Cyan Axolotl
  - Gold Axolotl
